_comment: Experience timeline entries. Displayed in ExperienceSection.

bullets: Designed and shipped 6+ HRMS API endpoints for employee onboarding, role assignment, and access control
Built shopping cart, wishlist, and product filter in React.js — extracted shared filter state into a single context to eliminate prop-drilling across 3 component levels
Built reusable request-validation middleware with standardized error handling, reducing duplicated validation logic and improving API consistency across multiple modules
Engineered a leaderboard API using MongoDB aggregations, eliminating application-level sorting and improving the efficiency of ranking operations
Reduced database round trips by 50% in interview scheduling workflows by redesigning query patterns with aggregation joins and optimized data retrieval
Enhanced authentication security by migrating token handling to httpOnly cookies, adding CSRF validation, and implementing Redis-backed rate limiting for abuse prevention
